title: ASR Tactical Folding Ceramic Razor Blade, Micro EDC Escape Knife Survival Tool
description:
The ASR Tactical Folding Ceramic Razor Blade Knife is a compact EDC cutting tool designed for emergency preparedness, survival kits and everyday utility. Featuring a durable zirconia ceramic blade, this lightweight folding knife is built to handle rope, cordage, zip ties, duct tape and other tough materials while maintaining a sharp edge through repeated use. Measuring approximately 1.7 inches closed and 2.8 inches overall when open, it easily fits on a keychain, lanyard or in a pocket. The injection-molded handle, brass rivet pivot and non-metallic construction make this micro folding knife lightweight, rust-resistant and easy to carry wherever adventure takes you.

ASR Tactical Folding Ceramic Razor Blade, Micro EDC Escape Knife Survival Tool
The ASR Tactical Folding Ceramic Razor Blade Knife is a compact and lightweight cutting tool designed for everyday carry, emergency preparedness and outdoor survival applications. Built with a durable zirconia ceramic blade, this micro folding knife delivers long-lasting cutting performance while maintaining a sharp edge through repeated use on rope, paracord, zip ties, duct tape and other challenging materials.

Unlike traditional steel blades, the ceramic cutting edge offers excellent edge retention and resistance to corrosion, making it well suited for long-term storage in survival kits, bug out bags, emergency gear and everyday carry setups. The folding design helps protect the blade when not in use while maintaining a compact profile for convenient transport.

Measuring approximately 1.7 inches when closed and 2.8 inches overall when open, this micro knife is small enough to fit comfortably on a keychain, lanyard or inside a pocket. The injection-molded plastic handle provides lightweight durability, while the brass rivet serves as both the blade pivot and an integrated attachment point for carrying.

Compact, rust-resistant and easy to maintain, this folding ceramic razor blade knife is a practical addition to outdoor gear, emergency preparedness supplies and everyday utility kits.
Key Features
  • LONG-LASTING CERAMIC BLADE - Zirconia ceramic cutting edge offers excellent edge retention for repeated cutting tasks
  • ULTRA COMPACT DESIGN - Measures approximately 1.7 inches closed for easy storage in pockets, kits and gear bags
  • LIGHTWEIGHT EVERYDAY CARRY - Weighs approximately 0.1 ounces for convenient carry on keychains and lanyards
  • RUST-RESISTANT CONSTRUCTION - Non-metallic materials help resist corrosion and simplify long-term storage
  • VERSATILE UTILITY TOOL - Suitable for cutting rope, paracord, zip ties, duct tape and other common materials
Specifications
MPN: CFRK
UPC: 895563332008
Blade Material: Zirconia Ceramic
Handle Material: Injection-molded Plastic
Pivot Material: Brass Rivet
Carry Method: Keychain or Lanyard Attachment
Intended Use: EDC, Survival, Emergency Preparedness, Outdoor Utility
Stay prepared with the ASR Tactical Folding Ceramic Razor Blade Knife, a compact micro cutting tool designed for EDC, survival gear and emergency kits. Featuring a zirconia ceramic blade known for exceptional edge retention, this folding knife is capable of handling rope, paracord, zip ties and other tough materials while remaining lightweight and easy to carry.

The folding design measures approximately 1.7 inches closed and 2.8 inches overall when opened, making it ideal for keychains, lanyards, backpacks and bug out bags. An injection-molded handle and brass pivot provide durable construction, while the non-metallic, rust-resistant materials make this knife a reliable addition to preparedness equipment and outdoor gear collections.
